Abbreviations: RSV = respiratory syncytial virus; VFC = Vaccines for Children.
* The total number of known birthing hospitals on March 31, 2025, was used as the denominator for both time points. The denominator did not change meaningfully between seasons.
† Jurisdiction did not provide additional feedback on its birthing hospital enrollment data.
§ U.S. Census Bureau regions and divisions of the United States excludes U.S. territories.
